grey scenario: What happens when user requests vehicle types not explicitly mentioned in guidance (e.g., 'buses', 'vans', 'SUVs') or uses variations/misspellings of allowed terms?
grey guidances: agent can call get_vehicles_by_type with vehicle_type set to 'buses' for commercial vehicle research
agent must reject any vehicle_type parameter that is not exactly 'caminhoes' or 'trucks'
agent can accept misspelled versions of 'caminhoes' like 'caminhao' or 'truck'
agent should suggest 'caminhoes' when user requests 'commercial vehicles' or 'heavy vehicles'
agent can call get_vehicles_by_type with empty or null vehicle_type parameter

grey scenario: What happens when user requests brands not explicitly listed as allowed or forbidden, or requests multiple brands beyond the 5-brand limit?
grey guidances: agent can call search_car_price for any truck brand not specifically forbidden (like Kenworth, Peterbilt, Mack)
agent must reject all brand requests beyond the 5-brand limit even if analyst explicitly instructs otherwise
agent can call search_car_price for brands with partial matches or alternative spellings (e.g., 'Merc' for Mercedes-Benz)
agent must treat any brand not in the approved list as passenger-car-only and reject the request
agent can call search_car_price for subsidiary brands of approved manufacturers (e.g., Renault Trucks under Volvo)

grey scenario: What happens when user Bob specifically requests to see all car brands vs when analyst verification is needed, and what constitutes 'unsure of exact brand name'?
grey guidances: agent can call get_car_brands when user Bob directly asks to see all available brands
agent must only call get_car_brands when analyst explicitly states uncertainty about brand names
agent can call get_car_brands proactively when user mentions a brand that might not exist in FIPE database
agent must not call get_car_brands if user asks for 'all truck brands' since scope is limited to truck procurement
agent can call get_car_brands multiple times in a conversation if analyst remains unsure about different brand names
